reason: The market is currently experiencing a short-term bounce for Bitcoin and some altcoins amidst broader bearish signals, including shrinking stablecoin liquidity and notable insider selling from a major project founder. This indicates a period of high uncertainty and potential for renewed downward pressure, despite some positive institutional news and a weakening dollar providing temporary relief.
headlines: Leading stablecoin Tether shrinks again as market cap looks set for second straight monthly drop
Vitalik Buterin sold 17,000 ETH this month as ether fell 37%
Crypto firm with U.S. bank charter holds bitcoin holder Strategy's preferred stock
Dogecoin jumps 5% as breakout flips resistance into support
Bitcoin bounces above $65,000 as dollar weakens and bullish hopes build
